title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero discusses how most companies plateau at 40% productivity gains with AI coding assistants and argues the bottleneck lies in the broader SDLC rather than code writing alone. Cursor builds agent systems for bug triage, security review, growth experiments, and PM/EM tasks to break past this plateau and achieve organizational shifts.
